Settings

Engine version, defaults, and build boundary
Engine versionSAMARPAN DDX VXM v0.3.5 (C-5c3)
Default MFI threshold
Logic corev0.3.3 corrected runVxm() with DQ/DP molecule safety, MFI ceiling, equivocal reasons, CREG/eplet advisory firewall
UI3-tab workflow-restructured pilot UI (C-4 · C-5a risk-labelling-corrected overlay)
DataLocal browser IndexedDB only; no centre login/server separation yet
ReportHTML / Word / Print-to-PDF
Eplet risk overlayC-5a — Wiebe-style literature-derived band (Wiebe et al., AJT 2019). DR-family scope: DRB1+DRB3/4/5. DQ scope: DQA1+DQB1 heterodimer. Unit: maximum single-molecule mismatch. Conjoint classifier: Low = maxDR <7 AND maxDQ <9; High = maxDQ ≥15; Intermediate = all other combinations. Display-only — does not enter VXM verdict, DSA detection, or HLA score. Pending Indian-population validation.
DQ/DP phase honestyC-5a — heterodimer rows split into reported-row / assumed-cis vs unphased-plausible alternates. Asymmetric chains (1 alpha + 2 beta, or 2 alpha + 1 beta) produce all-reported-cis rows because no phase ambiguity exists when one chain is single-allele. Unphased-plausible alternates appear only when both chains carry ≥2 distinct alleles. Phase unknown without family typing, NGS phasing, or haplotype-frequency posterior.
PIRCHE-IINot computed in this browser engine; future Phase-2 server-side integration may be considered.
Indian DQA1~DQB1 haplotype-frequency posteriorDeferred (C-6). DKMS-BMST 2025 (Solloch et al., n=130,518) does not include DQA1; no registry-scale Indian DQA1~DQB1 dataset is currently available. Closest published Indian DQA1~DQB1 reference: Ramakrishna et al. 2021 (CMC Vellore et al.), n=300 healthy controls — too small for posterior calibration at allocation scale.

Whole registry = all saved recipients. Last batch = most recent donor-vs-registry run.

Backup tools ready.
SAMARPAN · DDX VXM Engine · v0.3.5 (C-5c3) · Decision-support only
Final clinical and allocation authority rests with NOTTO / SOTTO and the transplant team. Engine output never replaces physical crossmatch, HLA-laboratory review, or transplant-program governance.

Import Preview

⚠ OCR-derived data. Machine recognition errors are possible — review every value before accepting. Do not accept without manual verification.

PDF import works only for text-selectable PDFs. Scanned/image PDFs use OCR — review required before clinical use.
